name: Spicy Island Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the chicken.
2. In a pot, combine water, garlic powder, curry powder, and lime juice. Bring to a boil.
3. Stir in noodles and green beans. Continue boiling over medium heat, stirring occasionally, for 7 minutes or until noodles are tender.
4. Stir in shredded chicken and coconut flakes. Heat through.
Sylvia's comments: In spite of its name, this was more flavorful than spicy. For a more fiery effect, use more curry powder.
